title: Establish pastures and crops for livestock production
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Establish pastures and crops for livestock production demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for pasture and crop establishment

pcs.text: Confirm the pasture and crop establishment program with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm the pasture and crop establishment program with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm the pasture and crop establishment program with supervisor.

pcs.text: Conduct pre-treatment of seed prior to sowing according to program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct pre-treatment of seed prior to sowing according to program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct pre-treatment of seed prior to sowing according to program.

pcs.text: Select sowing methods for crop and pasture species

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select sowing methods for crop and pasture species.

pcs.text: Apply fertilisers according to production program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply fertilisers according to production program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply fertilisers according to production program.

pcs.text: Select, check and operate machinery and equipment, digital technology and personal protective equipment (PPE)
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, check and operate machinery and equipment, digital technology and personal protective equipment (PPE)?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, check and operate machinery and equipment, digital technology and personal protective equipment (PPE).

pcs.text: Identify work health and safety hazards, assess risk and implement controls

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify work health and safety hazards, assess risk and implement controls.

pcs.text: Apply fertilisers and treatments according to program
